title: Gimme bundles!
description: Enables the use of the experimental bundles.
body:
Enables the use of the experimental bundles for Minecraft 1.17

Bundles can now be crafted like this:

![Crafting recipe](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/370/970/crafting_recipe.png)

## Discord
You can discuss, suggest new features and get previews of my mods on my [Discord server](https://discord.gg/G8s2q4wMnt)!
